name: sse-send
title: SSE Send
description: Send a Server-Sent Events (SSE) event to connected clients. Supports broadcast to all clients, topic-filtered broadcast, or targeted delivery to a specific connection.

display.description: Send an event to SSE clients

display.name: SSE Server Reference
display.description: Registry name of the SSE trigger to send events to. Use 'default' for single-server setups.

display.name: Default Topic
display.description: Default topic/channel for events — overridable per invocation via the topic input.

display.name: Event Type
display.description: Default SSE event type — overridable per invocation via the eventType input.

display.name: Retry Timeout (ms)
display.description: SSE retry field value — how long clients wait before reconnecting after a disconnect.

inputs.name: connectionId
inputs.description: Specific connection ID to send to (overrides target when set)

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Dispatch target: 'all', 'connection:ID', or 'topic:NAME'. Auto-built from connectionId/topic if omitted.

inputs.name: topic
inputs.description: Topic/channel to send to (overrides default topic setting)

inputs.name: eventType
inputs.description: SSE event type for this invocation (overrides default eventType setting)

display.name: Event Data
display.description: The event payload. Objects are JSON-serialised automatically.

display.name: Data Format
display.description: How to serialise the data payload: json, string, or auto-detect.

display.name: Enable Validation
display.description: Validate inputs before sending the event.

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True when the event was dispatched without error

outputs.name: sentCount
outputs.description: Number of clients that received the event

outputs.name: eventId
outputs.description: The event ID used (generated if not provided)

outputs.name: timestamp
outputs.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was sent

outputs.name: error
outputs.description: Error message when success is false
